message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first caut refresh in 2 account CLI surfaces (tick 272)

Migrates 2 ambient `CautClient::refresh` call sites in `main.rs` to
the cx-first sibling `refresh_cx`:

- L21934 `ft robot accounts refresh` (robot-mode dispatch):
  `caut.refresh_cx(&caut_cx, caut_service)` replacing ambient
- L31048 `ft accounts refresh` (human-CLI dispatch): same migration

Both sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
at the call site. The `_cx` variant on `CautClient` threads Cx through
the caut subprocess dispatch and response parsing so an operator-
cancellable Cx at the CLI spawn boundary now cleanly aborts a running
caut refresh (including waiting on subprocess stdout) rather than
letting it run to completion before unwinding.

Combined with tick 260's cx-first caut refresh usage-metric batch write
migration, the full caut refresh pipeline is now cx-aware end-to-end:

  CLI dispatch (tick 272)
    → CautClient subprocess invoke (tick 272 — threaded through refresh_cx)
      → refresh response parse (inside refresh_cx)
        → account upserts (already cx-first via main.rs tick 237/239)
          → usage-metric batch write (tick 260)

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 86 (187-272).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 146 sites (144 before + 2).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
